en: Praise the LORD!I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart, in the company of the upright, in the congregation.
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 在正直人的議會中和大會裡， 我要全心稱謝耶和華。

en: Great are the works of the LORD, studied by all who delight in them.
zh: 耶和華的作為偉大， 喜愛他作為的人都努力查究。

en: Full of splendor and majesty is his work, and his righteousness endures forever.
zh: 他的作為滿有尊榮和威嚴， 他的公義永遠長存。

en: He has caused his wondrous works to be remembered; the LORD is gracious and merciful.
zh: 他使人記念他所行的奇事； 耶和華有恩典，有憐憫。

en: He provides food for those who fear him; he remembers his covenant forever.
zh: 他賜糧食給敬畏他的人； 他永遠記念自己的約。

en: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the inheritance of the nations.
zh: 他向自己的子民彰顯大能的作為， 把列國賜給他們為業。

en: The works of his hands are faithful and just; all his precepts are trustworthy;
zh: 他手所作的都是誠實和公正； 他的訓詞都是可信靠的。

en: they are established forever and ever, to be performed with faithfulness and uprightness.
zh: 他的訓詞是永遠確定的， 是按著信實和正直制訂的。

en: He sent redemption to his people; he has commanded his covenant forever. Holy and awesome is his name!
zh: 他向自己的子民施行救贖； 他命定自己的約，直到永遠； 他的名神聖可畏。

en: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; all those who practice it have a good understanding. His praise endures forever!
zh: 敬畏耶和華是智慧的開端； 凡是這樣行的都是明智的。 耶和華該受讚美，直到永遠。
